message:
test(proptest): expand session_topology from 18 to 33 property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 15 new tests covering from_panes (pane_count, window_count, tab_count,
pane_ids, captured_at, JSON roundtrip), match_panes (old/new coverage,
injectivity, empty cases), CaptureReport inference_quality, TopologySnapshot
serde determinism, and PaneNode JSON type tag correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
